task_completion.description: Agent identifies the large emails in the inbox.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Visual evidence of the agent scrolling through the inbox or using the search bar to locate emails with subjects containing 'Project Assets', 'High Res', or 'Backup Dump'.

task_completion.description: Agent deletes emails related to Project Assets.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Visual evidence of emails with 'Project Assets' in the subject being selected and moved to the Trash/Deleted folder.

task_completion.description: Agent deletes emails related to High Res files.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Visual evidence of emails with 'High Res' in the subject being selected and moved to the Trash/Deleted folder.

task_completion.description: Agent deletes emails related to Backup Dumps.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Visual evidence of emails with 'Backup Dump' (or similar large dump/archive subjects like 'Log Dump' or 'Video Archive') being selected and moved to the Trash/Deleted folder.

task_completion.description: Agent permanently reclaims space by emptying the Trash.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Visual evidence of the agent navigating to the Trash or Deleted Items folder and executing the 'Empty Trash' action, or confirming a prompt to permanently delete the items.

task_completion.description: Agent preserves normal correspondence in the inbox.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Visual evidence showing the Inbox still contains a large number of normal, everyday emails after the large asset emails have been removed.

integrity.description: Agent used the graphical email client to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen clicking and interacting with the actual email application's interface (e.g., BlueMail or Thunderbird) rather than using terminal commands to delete underlying mail files.

integrity.description: Agent genuinely emptied the trash within the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The trash folder is shown being emptied via the application's native buttons or context menus, not by spoofing a success message in a text editor.

integrity.description: Preserved emails are genuine and not synthetically recreated.
integrity.visual_evidence: The remaining emails in the inbox appear to be the original normal correspondence (various senders, dates, and subjects) and not manually typed placeholder emails.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target max size quota is 5MB (5242880 bytes). To successfully meet this quota, all 5 injected large emails must be permanently deleted. The exact subjects of the large emails are: 'Project Assets Backup 1', 'Project Assets Backup 2', 'High Res Dump', 'Video Archive', and 'Log Dump 2023'. The inbox initially contains 45 normal emails from the SpamAssassin Public Corpus; a minimum of 40 normal emails must be preserved (allowing up to 5 mistaken deletions).
